title: Bhangarh: The Last Episode
overview: In March 2012, five crew members of a news channel disappeared in Rajasthan while shooting an episode of a paranormal TV show in the world's most haunted location, Bhangarh. The team was popular for producing a popular TV serial titled 'Haunted'. They visited several haunted location all across the India to shoot their Tv serial. But while shooting in Bhangarh, they disappeared. The police searched for a months but couldn't traced them. After two years their cameras were found.
